title: Incendiary Blonde
writer: Claude Binyon, Frank Butler, Ken Englund
actors: Betty Hutton, Arturo de Córdova, Charles Ruggles
plot: The life of boisterous entertainer Texas Guinan is recalled from her poor childhood with a down-on-his-luck father to her reign as the Queen of the Night Clubs. Along the way, she also finds romance and heartbreak.
